name: Weiss Wednesday / Gifts specifically for you! /
description:
It's Weiss Wednesday! Today the white haired lady brings you as usual, two gifts that are not related to eachother, at all!

I got this idea from Reddit, where someone send a meme every Wednesday about Weiss gifting you two things, but I couldn't find any of the original one's so I had to make the image of the bot myself. But of course I'd do anything for my Ice queen (I like her).

Anyways, I'm back! Been a while since I posted, and hopefully I will stop slacking off, and actually make the damn Helga bot eventually. And no, I am not retiring, I will announce it if I ever do.

As usual, my art:

https://files.catbox.moe/kat1y2.jpg
creator: Resh0101
